title: Zeuxine tripleura
taxonomy: Zeuxine tripleura is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Zeuxine tripleura is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae, and more specifically, it is a member of the tribe Triphoreae. The exact classification of Zeuxine tripleura may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a type of terrestrial orchid. Its classification is still evolving as new research and discoveries are made about this and other orchid species.
